examples: Why do you think would the rich, usually so quick to isolate themselves in real life, be so eager to embrace the hoi polloi online?
As the Jet Set gave way to budget airlines, in places like airports and theme parks even the wealthiest often rubbed shoulders with hoi polloi.
The sites — essentially MySpace for millionaires — promise safe havens for the affluent where they can flirt, swap advice, plan parties and find new PALS without mixing with hoi polloi.
It is also a potent foundation for which Yahoo broke ground for the hoi polloi.
Just don't expect the variant for the hoi polloi to have the same bells and whistles.
